commit.message:
Replace Bonus % with pool-aware Dominance Score on leaderboard pages

- New lb_p_dominance and lb_gp_dominance RPCs compute dominance score
  filtered to the selected pool (district / region / state) — each pool
  is cumulative: region includes district matches, state includes all
- Formula: Pin 9−(sec÷60) · TF 5.0 · MD 2.0 · Dec 1.0 · loser gets −score
- Minimum 2 wins to appear in the list
- Updated analytics tab description to match new dominance formula

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Sync download link with displayed fortune (index=0)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add high priority NumPy ops

Implements all high priority ops identified in the NumPy parity audit:

Creation:
- zerosLike, onesLike, emptyLike, fullLike

Broadcasting:
- broadcastTo, broadcastArrays

Shape manipulation:
- swapaxes, moveaxis, squeeze (with negative axis)
- expandDims, reshape (with -1 inference), flatten
- concatenate, stack, split

Conditional:
- where (with broadcasting)

Advanced indexing:
- take (with axis support and negative indices)

Batched operations:
- batchedMatmul (with batch dimension broadcasting)

Einstein summation:
- einsum (supports arbitrary subscripts, contraction, and implicit output)

All ops implemented in:
- test-utils.ts (Backend interface)
- js-backend.ts (reference implementation)
- wasm-backend.ts (WASM wrapper)
- webgpu-backend.ts (WebGPU with CPU fallback)

Also adds:
- docs/NUMPY-PARITY-AUDIT.md - comprehensive audit report
- tests/manipulation.test.ts - 40+ tests for new ops

All 330 tests passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: anon localStorage storage + DB sync on login (#37)

* feat: Google OAuth authentication with anon data migration

Add Supabase Auth with PKCE flow for SPA OAuth. On login, anon data
(favorites, progress, aliases, overrides, algorithms, todo) is claimed
via SECURITY DEFINER RPC with conflict deduplication. REST and GraphQL
clients use dynamic headers that switch between anon key and JWT.

- Supabase client singleton with PKCE + detectSessionInUrl
- Auth Zustand store (initialize, signInWithGoogle, signOut)
- REST: restJson/restVoid helpers with res.ok error handling
- REST: dynamic getHeaders/userFilter/userPayload + anon ID tracking
- GraphQL: function-based headers with JWT injection
- Settings modal AuthField (Google sign-in / avatar+email+sign-out)
- DB: fix USING(true) RLS on user_favorites/user_progress
- DB: authenticated policies with (select auth.uid()) for all 6 tables
- DB: restrict old public-role anon policies to anon-only
- DB: claim_anon_data RPC for anon-to-user data migration

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: anon data localStorage migration design

Move anonymous user data from Supabase DB (user_id IS NULL) to
localStorage-only storage, syncing to DB on login. Eliminates anon
DB access, claim RPC, and fragile ID tracking.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: anon data localStorage-only storage with DB sync on login

Remove all anonymous DB access — anon users store data exclusively in
localStorage. On Google OAuth login, syncLocalDataToDb() calls the
sync_local_data RPC to merge localStorage data into DB, then clears
localStorage. Fix RPC search_path issue (qualify table refs with public.).
Add auth loading gate in CaseList to prevent empty-state flicker.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: resolve 4 QA failures (F-1 through F-4)

F-1: Handle library scan error events in renderer — add error field to
LibraryScanProgress type and check for it in onLibraryScanProgress so
the app exits scanning state and shows the error instead of hanging.

F-2: Show error state on OAuth2 callback failure — check for error
field in onAuthStateChanged data and set authScreenState to 'error'
instead of silently resetting to 'default'.

F-3: Make "track not in library" state reachable (E10) — add
trackNotInLibrary flag to DeckState, set it in DeckWatcher when a
track is detected but not found in the library index, and use it in
NowPlaying to distinguish E10 from E5 (no deck loaded).

F-4: Remove outline:'none' from inline styles on HeaterButton,
GearIcon, and SettingsPanel buttons so the CSS :focus-visible rule
in global.css applies correctly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(ingest): don't count 400 (invalid key) responses against dimension skip budget

400 responses mean the SIAPE code is structurally invalid for that endpoint.
They should never exhaust the skip budget — only truly empty data responses count.
Also raise max_empty_skips to max(1000, len(dim_keys)*3) to cover large dimensions.

Fixes pt_viagens and pt_servidores_remuneracao completing with 0 items when
many SIAPE codes return 400 for those endpoints.

commit.message:
fix(users): createUser() now links org + fund atomically (#77)

* fix(users): createUser() now links org + fund atomically

- createUser() wraps in $transaction with organizationId + FundMember
- acceptInvitation() sets organizationId from investor commitment chain
- Layout sets active fund cookie when resolved from membership fallback
- FUND_ADMIN with null org can still resolve a fund (single-tenant)

Previously, admin-created users had no org or fund linkage,
making them invisible to the entire RBAC system.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address all code review findings on PR #77

- Remove setActiveFundId() from RSC layout render (would throw
  ReadonlyRequestCookiesError in Next.js 15 — cookies().set() is
  only permitted during 'action' phase, not render)
- Add requireFundAccess() before FundMember creation in createUser()
  for defense-in-depth per CLAUDE.md
- Move fund resolution inside canBecomeFundMember() gate so LP/Auditor
  user creation doesn't require an active fund
- Add org boundary guard on investor.update in createUser() — verify
  investor belongs to caller's organization before linking
- Add console.error in acceptInvitation() when org can't be resolved
  from investor commitment chain

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: corrigir timezone do cron — usar horário de São Paulo ao invés de UTC

O cron rodava no Vercel em UTC, então às 19h BRT (22h UTC) o sistema
achava que estava fora do horário de trabalho (08:00-18:00) e não
executava nenhuma ação. Agora usa toLocaleString com timezone da config.

Também corrige contagem diária de ações para usar meia-noite BRT.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: Persist active tab across page refresh (F5)

Save current page to localStorage on navigate/goBack, restore on init.
No more resetting to dashboard on refresh.

send rich metadata to Chromecast for tracks and audiobooks

Tracks: pass title and thumb to play_media so the speaker/display shows
the song name and cover art.

Audiobooks: use metadataType 3 (MusicTrackMediaMetadata) on each queue
item with title (chapter name), albumName (book title), trackNumber, and
cover image — so the speaker announces the chapter name and any connected
display shows the book title and artwork.

Add 5 business credit approval newsletters — March 2026

- nmd-sba-sbss-drop-2026.html — Breaking News: SBA eliminates SBSS requirement for 7(a) loans under $350K
- nmd-bank-approval-reality.html — Real Talk: 57% approval rate breakdown + pre-approval checklist
- nmd-chase-ink-crackdown.html — Elite Strategy: Chase Ink family rules change + new business card plays
- nmd-paydex-80-blueprint.html — Credit Guide: Full PAYDEX/SBSS scoring system explained + 90-day build timeline
- nmd-net30-approval-playbook.html — Business Credit Builders: 60-day net 30 vendor playbook with vendor cards + phase system
- index.html — 5 new cards added to grid

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: Add plain text export option (without timestamps)

Implements "Include timestamps" checkbox for both individual and batch exports:
- Individual exports: Checkbox appears next to export buttons in transcript section
- Batch exports: Checkbox in export modal (checked by default)
- When unchecked, TXT/PDF/DOCX export plain fullText without timestamps
- SRT always includes timestamps (subtitle format requires them)

Export behavior:
- TXT: Plain text (no timestamps) vs timestamped lines
- PDF: Plain text paragraph vs table with timestamps
- DOCX: Plain text paragraph vs formatted with timestamps
- SRT: Unchanged (always with timestamps)

Technical changes:
- Added withTimestamps parameter to exportTxt, exportPdf, exportDocx functions
- Added includeTimestamps state for individual exports
- Updated batch export to pass withTimestamps parameter
- Added Unicode normalization for Slovak characters in PDF (partial fix)
- Updated in-app documentation

commit.message:
Add Auto DJ panel to web UI

Backend:
- DJSession state machine (starting/selecting/mixing/waiting_rating/complete/stopped/error)
- _run_dj_session() background thread — loops select→fuse→wait for rating
- POST /api/dj/start, GET /api/dj/<id>, POST /api/dj/<id>/rate,
  POST /api/dj/<id>/skip, POST /api/dj/<id>/stop

Frontend:
- Auto DJ card in right column with song picker, mix count, learn toggle
- Progress dots (one per mix, lights up as session advances)
- Live flow display: Song A → Song B
- Per-mix: download button, quality %, star rating, skip option
- New Session button on completion
